name: youtube-knowledge-db
description: Convert YouTube channels into searchable AI learning materials and knowledge databases with transcripts, summaries, tags, indexes, and chatbot search data.

interface.shortDescription: Turn YouTube channels into searchable AI knowledge bases.
interface.longDescription: A reusable workflow for collecting YouTube video lists, retrieving available captions, cleaning transcripts, generating detailed summaries, tagging videos, building indexes, and preparing chatbot-ready search data.
defaultPrompt: Convert this YouTube channel into a knowledge DB.
Build transcript summaries and tags for this channel.
Create chatbot search data from these videos.
